name: H2O-Danube 1.8B
archDisplay: Dense Llama-2/Mistral-style transformer with sliding-window attention + GQA
note: H2O.ai's debut small LLM, Llama-style architecture, tuned for efficient on-device/mobile inference.

results.notes: 0-shot ARC-Easy for h2o-danube-1.8b-chat, from the HF model card's benchmark table; independently cross-confirmed in the technical report (arXiv:2401.16818, Table 4, chat-model commonsense reasoning results).
0-shot OpenBookQA for h2o-danube-1.8b-chat, from the HF model card's benchmark table; cross-confirmed in arXiv:2401.16818 Table 4.
0-shot PIQA for h2o-danube-1.8b-chat, from the HF model card's benchmark table; cross-confirmed in arXiv:2401.16818 Table 4.

5-shot MMLU for h2o-danube-1.8b-chat, Open LLM Leaderboard-style eval, from the technical report Table 5. Below the taxonomy's typical MMLU floor, but this is a genuine, expected result for a 1.8B chat model and uses the same standardized harness as the leaderboard.
0-shot TruthfulQA (MC) for h2o-danube-1.8b-chat, Open LLM Leaderboard-style eval, from the technical report Table 5.
5-shot GSM8K for h2o-danube-1.8b-chat, Open LLM Leaderboard-style eval, from the technical report Table 5.

verificationNotes: Existence and Jan 30, 2024 release confirmed via arxiv.org/abs/2401.16818 and VentureBeat coverage. 1.8B params, 16,384 context length, and Mistral-style sliding-window attention (4096) confirmed by fetching the HF model card directly. Apache 2.0 license confirmed. All four benchmark scores (ARC-Challenge 39.25, HellaSwag 67.6, Winogrande 65.35, TriviaQA 36.29) confirmed to literally appear on huggingface.co/h2oai/h2o-danube-1.8b-chat - exact match, no changes needed.
